messages.text: [New-Power] Built motivated-seller lead pipeline: leads/run.py (demo CLI), leads/fetch.py (ATTOM + mock data), leads/export.py (CSV), leads/mailer.py (SMTP), leads/pipeline.py (daily runner), .github/workflows/daily-leads.yml (cron). Demo tested: 10 leads in 1.2s, clean CSV. Registry updated with lead-gen-pipeline project. | Tasks: 29/36 done
